titleStmt.title: SII 41.278: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 278. (A.R. No. 495 of 1905.) Tiruvālaṅgāḍu, Tiruttani Taluk, Chittoor District. On the third gōpura of the Vataranyesvara temple at Tiruvalangadu, left of entrance.

summary.p: Sale of tax-free land by the ūrār of Paḻaiyanūr to adigārigaḷ Kuvaḷai-vēli-uḍaiyān Kōyil Chittanār alias Pañchavan-mūvēndavēḷān, who assigned the same to the temple for the supply of water from Pālāṟu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiṅkaḷertarutaṉṟoṅkal veṇkuṭai niḻaṟkkiḻ nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ puṇarntuceṅkoloccik karuṅkalikaṭintu maṉnu palūḻiyuḷ teṉnavar muvaruḷ mānāparaṇa
ṉ poṉmuṭiyānāpparumaṇimatiḷ pacun=talai porukaḷattarintu virakeraḷaṉai Āṉaikkaṭuvittacaivil cun=tarapāṇṭiyaṉai ticaikeṭat tollai mullaiyūrtturatti Olkalil veṇāṭṭaracai ceyṇṇāṭṭotukki pukaḻirāmakuṭa muvarkeṭa munintu velaikeḻu kān=taḷūrccālai maṟuppittāhāhomallaṉumañcak kevutanṟāṅ
karumpaṭaiyā lāṅkavaṉ ceṉaiyuḷu kaṇṭappayanum kaṅkātaranum vaṇṭamar kaḷiṟṟoṭumaṭiya tiṇṭiṟal virutar vikkiyum vicaiyātittanu karumuṟaṉ cāṅka payyaṉum mutalinar samarabhiruvottuṭai nimircuṭarp poṉnoṭayaṅkeri puraviyoṭum piṭittut taṉṉuṭaiyil ceyaṅkoṇṭuṉṉār ko
ḷḷippākkaiyuḷḷerimaṭuppittoru tanittaṇṭāṟ porutiraiyuṭuttu Ilaṅkaiykkiṟaivaṉu maṅkalamuṭiyarintu muṉṟanak kuṭainta teṉṟamiḻ maṇṭala vikramapāṇṭiyaṉ parumaṇi munin=ta man=tira villavar minavar veñciṉac caḷukkiyar pallavar mutalinar vaṇaṅka viṟṟi ceyaṅko
ṇṭacoḻaṉ Uyarn=ta perumpukaḻ kovirājakecarivanmarānavuṭaiyār śrīrājādhirāja tevaṟkku yāṇṭu 2 10 8 Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu meṉmalaippaḻaiyaṉūr nāṭṭup paḻaiyanūr Ūrom nilavilaiyāvaṇakkaiyeḻuttu coḻamaṇṭalattu nittavinotavaḷanāṭṭu ve
ṇṇikkūṟṟattu kuvalaiveliyuṭaiyāṉ koyil cittanārāṉa Atikārikaḷ pañcavaṉ muventaveḷān tiruvālaṅkāṭu Uṭaiyārkku pālāṟṟu niṉṟum taṇṇiraṭuvatakku taṇṇir Amutu Arumoḻitevanāl nicatipatakku nellāka Āṇṭuvarai Aṟupatiṉkala nellukku vanta
kkuṭutta nilattukku kiḻpāṟkkellai ta yiluṭaiyāṉ kaṭaikāḷatti nilattukku mēṟkkum teṉpāṟkkellai can=tiracekara viḷākattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai toka
kommaṭi maṭattukkum pāmāṉiṭappaṭṭa cevamukkum kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkkellai mārāyirakālukkum teṟkum Iṉṉāṉkellai Uḷḷum Akappaṭṭa nilam Uṇṇilamoḻiviṉṟi patiṉaṟucāṇ kolāl kuḻi
muvāyiratti ṉṟa de m veṇṭum Iṟaipporuḷum vilaipporuḷum Aṟakkoṇṭu Iṉṉāṟpāṟkellai Uḷḷum Akappaṭṭa nilam meṭum paḷḷamum maṭuvum kāṭum nattamum
koṇṭu cantirātittavaraiyum Ittaṉma muṭṭāmai tevakanmikaḷe celuttuvarāka viṟṟukkuṭuttom Iṉnilattukku Iṟai Epperpaṭṭatum nāṅkaḷē Iṟuttu Ittaṉmattukku Iṉ nilamāka
kkuṭuttom Iṉnila cuṭṭi Oṭṭiṟaiyum An=tarāyamum Eṟicālum Alampiṟaiyum cilliṟai Eccoṟumāyamum maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭa Iṟaikaḷum nāṅkaḷe
Digital edition of SII 41.278 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
